response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Standard lyrics perfectly match the vocals. 2. JSON Usage: Highly utilized, including the spoken segments at the end. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to the vocal bursts, with short pauses properly segmented.

subtitles.original: 大世界
subtitles.english: The grand world

subtitles.original: ダーリン ダーリン ダーリン...
subtitles.english: Darling, Darling, Darling...

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: It is time to show the answer to you who doesn't know the meaning of eternity.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先へ
subtitles.english: To the end of the spiral that continues into the dream.

subtitles.original: 夢幻
subtitles.english: [Song: Mugen]

subtitles.original: 生き急ぐ理由は 儚い未来手繰った弱さ
subtitles.english: The reason for rushing through life is the weakness of grasping at a fleeting future,

subtitles.original: それを強さと履き違えている
subtitles.english: mistaking that for strength.

subtitles.original: 憎い 憎い 醜い 醜い
subtitles.english: Hateful, hateful, ugly, ugly,

subtitles.original: 月を隠すほどの
subtitles.english: to the point of hiding the moon,

subtitles.original: 黒く 黒く 淀む 心
subtitles.english: a black, black, stagnant heart,

subtitles.original: 君さえ居なければ
subtitles.english: if only you didn't exist.

subtitles.original: ゆらいでいる ゆらいでる 花のように意思を繋ぐ
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying, like a flower connecting our wills,

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: taking away, taking away, tearing the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: It is time to show the answer to you who doesn't know the meaning of eternity.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先に
subtitles.english: At the end of the spiral that continues into the dream,

subtitles.original: 待つのは誰
subtitles.english: who is waiting?

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた運命を飲んだ 背負った数の名前を覚えた
subtitles.english: I accepted the fate I was born with, remembering the names of those I carried.

subtitles.original: 爛れるほど 心燃やす感情
subtitles.english: An emotion burning my heart to the point of festering.

subtitles.original: 憎い 憎い 醜い 醜い
subtitles.english: Hateful, hateful, ugly, ugly,

subtitles.original: 世界を分かつほどの
subtitles.english: to the point of dividing the world,

subtitles.original: 怒り 怒り 燃やす 心
subtitles.english: anger, anger, a burning heart,

subtitles.original: 君さえ居なければ
subtitles.english: if only you didn't exist.

subtitles.original: ゆらいでる ゆらいでいる 花のように意思をつなぐ
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying, like a flower connecting our wills,

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: taking away, taking away, tearing the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: It is time to show the answer to you who doesn't know the meaning of eternity.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先で
subtitles.english: At the end of the spiral that continues into the dream,

subtitles.original: 待つのは誰
subtitles.english: who is waiting?

subtitles.original: 鬼哭に耳を傾けた仕舞よ
subtitles.english: Listening to the wailing of demons, it's the end.

subtitles.original: この身に宿る万物で終いよ
subtitles.english: It is the end with all things dwelling in this body.

subtitles.original: 夢幻を他者に託した弱き人
subtitles.english: Weak people who entrusted the dream to others.

subtitles.original: 命の輝きは幾星霜に
subtitles.english: The radiance of life is through many years,

subtitles.original: 祈りの瞬きが照らす斜陽に
subtitles.english: in the setting sun illuminated by the twinkling of prayers.

subtitles.original: 千夜を身に宿し 解を押し付ける
subtitles.english: Dwelling a thousand nights, imposing the solution,

subtitles.original: 枯らしていく 枯らしていく 夢幻の夜に花を裂く
subtitles.english: withering away, withering away, tearing flowers in the dream night.

subtitles.original: 繋いでいく 繋いでいく 嵐に種を撒いて
subtitles.english: Connecting, connecting, sowing seeds in the storm.

subtitles.original: ゆらいでる ゆらいでる 花のように意思を繋ぐ
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying, like a flower connecting our wills,

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: taking away, taking away, tearing the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: It is time to show the answer to you who doesn't know the meaning of eternity.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先で
subtitles.english: At the end of the spiral that continues into the dream,

subtitles.original: 待つのは誰
subtitles.english: who is waiting?

subtitles.original: イェーイ
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: ということでね、ねねちに来ていただきました！
subtitles.english: So, we have Nene-chi joining us!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとうございます！ねねたんです！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday! I'm Nene-tan!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: よく…抑えきれたな！
subtitles.english: You did well holding it back!

subtitles.original: なんかもうね、か、顔、顔はもう…
subtitles.english: Like, my face, my face is already...

subtitles.original: 涙で滲んでいる！
subtitles.english: ...blurred with tears!
